domain: Lithuanian sutartinės secondal-dissonance polyphony (UNESCO 2010; multi-part vocal tradition; Schwebungs-Diaphonie beat-diaphony with ~1.7 semitone intervallic seconds; horizontal voice-independence; orthogonal voice trajectories in pitch space; rhythmic interlock without vertical harmonization)
specific_mechanism: SUTARTINES-DIAPHONY-NULL: K-voice orthogonal LoRA channel adapter with secondal-dissonance subspace-distance preservation + rhythmic interlock. (1) Decompose LoRA update ΔW into K voice-channels {V₁, ..., V_K} via three-factor U·S·Vᵀ split. (2) Stiefel-orthonormality constraint <V_i, V_j>=0 for i≠j (orthogonal voice subspaces). (3) Secondal-dissonance preservation: regularize ||subspace(V_i) − subspace(V_j)|| > τ_dissonance (prevent collapse into single chord-space). (4) Rhythmic interlock: shared rhythmic mask M_rhythm gates same time-slices across all voices but pitch-independent activations. (5) Voices traverse orthogonal null-space directions; no rank reduction to single-chord.
llm_application: SUTARTINES-DIAPHONY-NULL K-voice orthogonal LoRA with secondal-dissonance subspace-distance preservation + rhythmic interlock cross-voice beat-mask. Differs from R414 KAREN-WEFT-NULL (weft-warp tensor decomp). R427 ULI-EPHEMERAL (short-lived ink). R441 BOGOLAN-FERMENT-NEG (negative-resist subtraction). R453 SLACK-TENSION-NULL (slack-tension tube). R469 ORTHO-LORA-TEAM (equal-load gradient norm balance — closest but no dissonance preservation, no rhythmic interlock). Differs from CLoRA ACL 2025 (null-space direction constraint via pre-defined subspace — closest, but no K-voice separation, no dissonance preservation). O-LoRA EMNLP 2023 (continual orthogonal LoRA tasks). StelLA NeurIPS 2025 (Stiefel orthonormal LoRA — partially matches but no dissonance preservation or rhythmic interlock). Differs by K-VOICE STIEFEL CHANNEL + SECONDAL-DISSONANCE SUBSPACE-DISTANCE LOWER BOUND + RHYTHMIC INTERLOCK MASK.
novelty_claim: CLoRA + O-LoRA + StelLA + Continual Gradient LR cover orthogonal-LoRA paradigm. SUTARTINES-DIAPHONY-NULL adds (a) K-voice Stiefel channel decomposition + (b) explicit secondal-dissonance subspace-distance lower bound + (c) shared rhythmic interlock mask. Recombination — orthogonal multi-channel LoRA combined with dissonance-preservation is borderline lookup.
content_words: K-voice orthogonal LoRA channel separation Stiefel

llm_side: K-voice orthogonal LoRA channel separation Stiefel
